narrative:
Ballville D (precinct in Sandusky County) has 826 registered voters, with 42.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.1 percentage points.
